prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科组（含理科/物理类）最低位次分别为约101名、106名、113名、49名（2024年物理类）、49名（2025年物理类）。2021-2024年位次在101-113名之间窄幅波动，2025年因吉林省新高考改革后选科要求调整，位次大幅跃升至49名，但该变化主要反映科类划分口径差异，并非真实竞争格局突变；该校在吉林省理科组招生计划：2021年29人、2022年29人、2024年27人、2025年31人、2026年33人。2026年较2025年扩招2人（约6.5%），扩招有利于缓解竞争，对位次有轻微推后作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 清华大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第1名，学校层次为全国最高水平，对考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理、校园安全等常规话题，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第2（综合热度约1402万），评价为高热，反映报考关注度极高，竞争热度不减。历史投档异常记录中未见清华大学有明显断档信号；清华大学拥有A+学科20余个（计算机、土木、建筑、机械、材料、电气、力学、数学、物理、化学、生物、工商管理、法学、马克思主义理论等），A-及以上学科超过40个，学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类、人工智能等专业持续高热，临床医学（协和）等医学类专业热度稳定；吉林省2026年考生总数110868人（较2025年111492人微降约0.6%），但无分科数据，按近年物理类占比约72%估算，物理类考生约7.98万人，考生规模总体稳定。；清华大学位于北京，对吉林省考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在吉林省招生计划占比较小（约0.04%），属全国性顶尖名校招生格局。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次因新高考改革口径变化而异常偏低（49名）、2026年计划小幅扩招（33人，+6.5%）、抖音高热反映报考关注度不减等因素，预测2026年物理类最低位次约61名，区间11–111名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、计算机科学实验班）
- 理科试验班（经济、金融与管理）（计算机科学与技术（与金融学双学位等专业））
- 临床医学类（学制8年）（协和）（临床医学）
- 工科试验班（无穹书院）（人工智能（等专业））。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（电子信息科学与技术）
- 工科试验班（为先书院）（交叉工程（等专业））
- 自动化类（自动化（含信息管理信息系统方向））
- 理科试验班（数理类）（数学与应用数学、物理学、数理基础科学、统计学、工程物理）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

- 理科试验班（化生类）（化学、生物科学、化学工程与工业生物工程）
- 建筑类（学制5年）（建筑学、城乡规划、风景园林）
- 工科试验班（秀钟书院）（交叉工程（等专业））。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 清华大学在吉林省物理类招生专业均为顶尖热门专业，各专业之间位次差距极小（2025年专业min_rank在11-49名之间）。位次在预测区间11-111名内，建议以二档专业为主力目标、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如11名以内）可重点冲击计算机类、协和临床医学等一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group (including science/physics category) were approximately 101, 106, 113, 49 (2024 physics category), and 49 (2025 physics category) respectively. Rankings fluctuated narrowly between 101-113 from 2021-2024. In 2025, due to adjustments in subject selection requirements after the new college entrance examination reform in Jilin Province, the ranking jumped significantly to 49, but this change mainly reflects differences in category classification standards, not a sudden shift in actual competition landscape. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Jilin Province: 29 in 2021, 29 in 2022, 27 in 2024, 31 in 2025, and 33 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an expansion of 2 students (about 6.5%), which helps alleviate competition and slightly pushes back the ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranked 1st in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years, representing the highest national level, strongly attracting candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving routine topics such as school management and campus safety, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 2nd overall (comprehensive popularity about 14.02 million), evaluated as high heat, reflecting extremely high application attention and undiminished competition heat. Historical admission anomaly records show no obvious gap signal for Tsinghua University. Tsinghua has more than 20 A+ disciplines (Computer Science, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Mechanical Engineering, Materials, Electrical Engineering, Mechanics, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Business Administration, Law, Marxist Theory, etc.) and over 40 disciplines rated A- or above, with top national disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Artificial Intelligence continue to be highly popular, while medical majors like Clinical Medicine (PUMC) maintain stable popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Jilin Province is 110,868 (a slight decrease of about 0.6% from 111,492 in 2025), but without subject-specific data. Estimating based on the recent physics category proportion of about 72%, physics category candidates are approximately 79,800, with overall candidate scale remaining stable. Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, exerting strong cross-provincial appeal to Jilin candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Jilin Province accounts for a small proportion (about 0.04%), reflecting the enrollment pattern of a top national prestigious university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormally low ranking in 2025 due to the new college entrance examination reform (49th), the slight expansion in the 2026 plan (33 students, +6.5%), and the high Douyin popularity reflecting undiminished application attention, the predicted minimum ranking for the physics category in 2026 is approximately 61st, with a range of 11 to 111.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Computer Science Experimental Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Economics, Finance and Management) (Computer Science and Technology (with dual degree in Finance, etc.))
- Clinical Medicine (8-year program) (PUMC) (Clinical Medicine)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Wuqiong Academy) (Artificial Intelligence (and other majors)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Weixian Academy) (Interdisciplinary Engineering (and other majors))
- Automation (Automation (including Information Management and Information Systems direction))
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Physics) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Mathematical and Physical Basic Science, Statistics, Engineering Physics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Equipment) (Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Chemistry and Biology) (Chemistry, Biological Science, Chemical Engineering and Industrial Bioengineering)
- Architecture (5-year program) (Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xiuzhong Academy) (Interdisciplinary Engineering (and other majors)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: All majors in Tsinghua University's physics category enrollment in Jilin Province are top popular majors, with minimal ranking differences between majors (2025 major min_rank between 11-49). For rankings within the predicted range of 11-111, it is recommended to target Tier 2 majors as the main goal, Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 11), focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science and PUMC Clinical Medicine.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group (including liberal arts/history category) were approximately 102, 104, 103 (2024 history category), and 16 (2025 history category). Rankings were highly stable between 102-104 from 2021 to 2024. In 2025, due to the change in subject classification after Jilin Province's new college entrance examination reform, the ranking jumped significantly to 16, reflecting adjustments in subject selection requirements rather than a sudden change in actual competition. The university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Jilin Province: 2 in 2021, 2 in 2022, 3 in 2024, 3 in 2025, and 3 in 2026. The 2026 plan remains the same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked first in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for many years, representing the highest national level. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks second overall (high heat), reflecting high attention from applicants. No obvious gaps in historical admission records have been observed for Tsinghua University. Its advantageous liberal arts disciplines include Law A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A, Marxist Theory A+, and Chinese Language and Literature A-, demonstrating top-tier strength in liberal arts as well.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Law and Economics/Finance continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Jilin Province is 110,868. Based on the recent proportion of history category examinees at about 28%, there are approximately 31,000 history category examinees, with the overall examinee scale remaining stable. Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Jilin Province examinees. Its enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Jilin Province is very small (only 3 spots), leading to highly concentrated competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormally low ranking in 2025 due to the new college entrance examination reform (16th), the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026 (3 spots), and the high Douyin popularity reflecting sustained applicant attention, the predicted minimum ranking for the history category in 2026 is approximately 26th, with a range of 1 to 76.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Tsinghua University only offers 3 majors in the history category in Jilin Province, with very close admission rankings for each major (the minimum professional rankings in 2025 ranged from 11 to 16). For rankings within the predicted range of 1 to 76, it is recommended to target Economics/Finance and Law majors. Due to the extremely small number of enrollments (only 3), there is considerable uncertainty in application. Examinees should carefully fill in their preferences based on their own rankings.
